candidates.why: Revenue-like but appears to be a small component of total income; not the main top-line measure.
Explicit total revenue line with large amounts; this is the main top-line sales figure for the company.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Amortization component within cost of revenues, not a revenue line; should not be used for REVT.
Non-operating, not core revenue; excluded for top-line revenue.
Financial income, not operating revenue.
Interest income, not operating revenue.
Investment income, not operating revenue.

candidates.row_label: Income Available to Com Excl ExtraOrd
candidates.why: Represents net income available to common, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Comprehensive Income - Attributable to Owners of Parent Company - Total
candidates.why: Comprehensive income measure, not revenue.
Total comprehensive income, not revenue.
Balance sheet asset, not a revenue line.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the explicit top-line revenue figure. Other candidates are components or non-operating/earnings measures, not suitable as REVT.

candidates.why: Direct costs of materials used in production; best match for cost of goods sold.
Labor and social costs likely include both production and overhead; less direct than materials for COGS.
Broad operating expenses; more SG&A-like overhead than direct COGS.
Financing-related, not cost of goods sold.
Financing-related, not cost of goods sold.
Investment-related, not operating COGS.
Aggregate non-operating result, not COGS.
Specific operating expense, not main COGS line.
R&D expense, not cost of goods sold.
Inventory component; balance sheet item, not period COGS.
Prepaid asset; not COGS.

candidates.row_label: Accrued Expenses and Other Current Liabi
candidates.why: Liability; not COGS.

variables.notes: Cost of materials is the clear direct production cost line and best proxy for COGS. Other listed expenses are overhead, labor, or financial items.

candidates.why: Income, not expense; should not be treated as SG&A cost.
Generic operating expense bucket consistent with SG&A/overhead (excluding COGS and D&A).

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Brands, Patents, Trademarks, Marketing & Artistic Intangibles
candidates.why: Amortization of intangibles; D&A is excluded from SG&A components per instructions.

variables.notes: Other Operating Expenses is the best available SG&A-type overhead component. Amortization lines are excluded per rule, and income lines are not SG&A costs.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development in Cost of Revenues
candidates.why: Amortization of previously capitalized R&D within COGS, not the current-period R&D expense itself.
Explicit R&D expense line (supplemental disclosure); best match for XRD.
Balance sheet-related amortization; not the period’s R&D expense.
Gross capitalized development costs (asset), not expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Net - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing value for R&D-related asset; not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Using the explicit income statement R&D expense (supplemental). Amortization and balance sheet R&D-related lines are not current-period expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Interest on lease liabilities; valid interest expense component but more specific than the general interest expense line.
Primary general interest expense line; best first-choice mapping for XINT.
Represents allocation of profit, not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure of lease interest; secondary to the main recognized expense lines.
Derivative asset; not an interest expense line.
Liability category, not an expense.
Liability category, not an expense.
Liability category, not an expense.
Liability category, not an expense.
Derivatives, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.
Equity component, not interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities

variables.notes: Interest Expense is the main line for borrowing costs; the lease-specific interest expense is provided as a secondary fallback per the priority rule.

candidates.why: Represents income attributable to parent shareholders, not the equity balance.

candidates.row_label: of which attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Income attribution detail, not an equity stock figure.
Likely an income or investment line, not total book equity.
Component of equity, but not total or specifically parent equity on its own.
Various subtotals of equity but not the main total attributable to parent.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent
candidates.why: Explicit parent/owner equity line, excluding non-controlling interests; ideal for BE.
Includes both parent and non-controlling interests; secondary choice if parent-only equity were unavailable.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to equity holders of the parent

variables.notes: Using the explicit parent equity line to avoid double-counting with non-controlling interests, per instructions.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation of profit; not the balance sheet minority equity but indicates existence of NCI.
Balance sheet line for non-controlling interests; primary choice for MIB (minority equity).
Alternative label for the same minority equity; useful if data appear under this label in some years.
Income statement flow, not stock, but confirms minority interest presence.

variables.notes: Both balance sheet lines represent non-controlling equity; they are listed as a priority list to handle possible label changes over time. Income statement lines are not used because MIB should be a stock measure.
